text:
BENTLEY III MEMORIAL LOOP. (a) State Loop 256 in the city of Palestine is designated as the Bascom W. Bentley III Memorial Loop.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Bascom W. Bentley III Memorial Loop and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at appropriate sites along the loop.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.190 (Sergeant Andrew James Creighton Memorial Highway) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(48), eff. September 1, 2023.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.211 — Bascom W

BENTLEY III MEMORIAL LOOP. (a) State Loop 256 in the city of Palestine is designated as the Bascom W. Bentley III Memorial Loop.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Bascom W. Bentley III Memorial Loop and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at appropriate sites along the loop.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.190 (Sergeant Andrew James Creighton Memorial Highway) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(48), eff. September 1, 2023.

*Added by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 699 (H.B.2521), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2021.*
